items.title: With Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, Nvidia reveals what really goes into a modern multimodal model
items.raw_content:
Nvidia releases Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, an open multimodal model for text, image, video and audio. Not only the performance is exciting, but also a look at the training data: it comes from Qwen, GPT-OSS, Kimi and DeepSeek OCR, among others.

The article
items.ai_summary: Nvidia 发布开源多模态模型 Nemotron 3 Nano Omni，支持多种模态。

items.title: Google signs AI deal with the Pentagon, ignoring protest from over 600 employees
items.raw_content:
Despite an open letter from hundreds of employees, Google has signed a contract giving the U.S. Department of Defense access to its AI models for classified work. Legal experts say the contract's safety clauses aren't legally binding.

The ar
items.ai_summary: Google无视600多名员工抗议，与五角大楼签署AI协议，允许国防部访问其AI模型用于机密工作，法律专家称安全条款无约束力。

items.title: Researchers find AI text is making the internet more uniform and weirdly cheerful
items.raw_content: A large-scale analysis of websites from the Internet Archive shows just how much AI text already saturate
items.ai_summary: 研究发现AI文本使互联网内容更趋同且异常积极。Cloudflare分析显示Bytespider等爬虫活跃，许多公司隐藏其AI爬虫。

items.title: OpenAI misses revenue targets as Anthropic and Google close in
items.raw_content:
OpenAI fell short of internal revenue goals for the first quarter of 2026. Meanwhile, pressure from competitors like Anthropic and Google is mounting, and tensions inside the company over massive spending commitments are growing.

The article
items.ai_summary: OpenAI 2026年第一季度未达内部收入目标，面临Anthropic和Google的竞争压力，内部对巨额支出承诺的分歧加剧。

items.title: Mistral AI takes on enterprise AI orchestration with Workflows
items.raw_content:
Mistral AI has rolled out Workflows, an orchestration layer that helps companies turn AI-powered processes into production-ready systems.

The article Mistral
items.ai_summary: Mistral AI 推出 Workflows 编排层，助力企业AI流程生产。

items.title: Meta scrambles to unwind Manus deal as Beijing's deadline looms
items.raw_content:
Meta is actively preparing to unwind the Manus acquisition, according to the Wall Street Journal.

The article Meta scrambles to unwind Manus deal as Beijing's deadl
items.ai_summary: Meta 正筹备撤销 Manus 收购以应对北京的最后期限。

items.title: Here is what an LLM that knows nothing after 1930 thinks our world looks like in 2026
items.raw_content:
"Talkie" is a 13B-parameter language model trained only on texts written before 1931. It doubts a second world war will happen and pictures 2026 as a world of steamships, railroads, and penny novels.

The article
items.ai_summary: 仅基于1931年前文本训练的LLM'Talkie'，对2026年世界做出怀旧预测。

items.title: Google's "Ask YouTube" turns video search into a conversation
items.raw_content:
Google is testing "Ask YouTube," a conversational search feature that replaces the standard video list with a results page combining text, full-length videos, and Shorts.

The article
items.ai_summary: Google正在测试“Ask YouTube”对话式搜索功能，将视频搜索结果改为文本、长视频和短视频的组合。

items.title: GitHub Copilot switches to token-based billing in June 2026
items.raw_content:
Starting June 1, 2026, GitHub will charge Copilot users based on actual usage instead of premium request counts.

The article GitHub Copilot
items.ai_summary: GitHub Copilot将于2026年6月1日起从按高级请求数计费改为按实际使用量（token）计费。

items.title: OpenAI and Microsoft rewrite their deal: no more exclusivity, no more AGI clause
items.raw_content:
OpenAI is free to distribute its products through any cloud provider, Microsoft loses its exclusive license to OpenAI's technology, and the controversial AGI clause is gone.

The article
items.ai_summary: OpenAI与Microsoft重新修订合作协议：OpenAI可通过任何云提供商分发产品，微软失去独家技术许可，AGI条款被删除。
